ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interval_types" (
  "interval_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the interval type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interval type */,
  "is_discrete" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interval type is discrete */,
  "is_continuous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interval type is continuous */,
  "is_computable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interval type can be used in computational operations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval */,
  "interval_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interval type */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* The lower bound of the interval */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* The upper bound of the interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interval was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interval was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interval is currently active */,
  "interval_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interval set to which the interval belongs */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervals_interval_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_type_id") REFERENCES interval_types ("interval_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervals_interval_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_set_id") REFERENCES interval_sets ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interval_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the interval set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interval set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interval set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interval set was last updated */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the interval set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interval_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "source_interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source interval */,
  "target_interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target interval */,
  "mapping_type" TEXT /* Type of mapping (e.g., 'union', 'intersection') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was last updated */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interval_mappings_target_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interval_mappings_source_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates if the condition is custom-defined */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interval_conditions" (
  "interval_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interval */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition applied to the interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was applied to the interval */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interval_conditions_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interval_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interval_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affected interval */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interval_logs_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interval_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interval_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interval on which the operation is performed */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., hull, union) */,
  "result_interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resulting interval from the operation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the operation was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the operation was last updated */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interval_operations_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interval_operations_result_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interval_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interval they have access to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interval_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interval_access_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interval_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interval being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the interval */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interval was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interval_versions_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interval_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interval_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistical record */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interval */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean of the interval values */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of the interval values */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the interval values */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the interval */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics were calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interval_statistics_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interval_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interval */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., created, updated) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interval_history_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id")
)
